```{r incidence density rate table}
#| label: tab-incidence-density-rates
#| tbl-cap: "Incidence densities of infections"
#| tbl-cap-location: bottom

table_incidence_density_rates |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    Infection = dplyr::case_match(
      as.character(.data$Infection),
      "si" ~ "Severe infection",
      "bsi" ~ "Sepsis/BSI",
      "hap" ~ "Pneumonia",
      "nec" ~ "Necrotising Enterocolitis")) |>
  gt(rowname_col = "Infection") |>
  fmt_number(decimals = 1) |>
  fmt_number(columns = "No of infections", decimals = 0) |>
  tab_row_group(label = "Sepsis/BSI/Pneumonia", rows = 1:3, id = "grp_si") |>
  tab_row_group(label = "Other", rows = 4, id = "grp_othr") |>
  row_group_order(groups = c("grp_si", "grp_othr")) |>
  tab_spanner(
    label = "Incidence density rate",
    columns = c("Pooled mean","Q1","Q2","Q3"),
    id = "incidence_density_rate"
  )
```
